name: SketchCut PRO
source_text: SketchCut PRO Business Negocios business SketchCut PRO - Fast Cutting. The application for automatic calculation of cutting drawings of parts from flat sheets. The app is designed with the features of cutting sheet materials (particleboard, MDF, glass, plastics, wood panels, etc.) both in the manual and on the machine. Full version SketchCut. Without advertising. The application functions are available: - choice and change of cutting parameters (sheet size, blade width, offset from the edge of the sheet, etc.); - edging (two types of edges); - order information (order, material, order date, availability date); - automatic cutting of sheets in accordance with the selected parameters; - three different algorithms for calculating and optimizing layouts - to select the best option of cutting; - automatic calculation of the area of parts and pieces, cut length, the length of the edges; - display of the results in the .PDF file for printing; - storing a list of parts and the cutting parameters on your device; - metric system and Imperial units, with a simple conversion

name: Sketch Clean
source_text: Sketch Clean graphics-design Turn notebook sketches into crisp line art on a transparent background — ready for colour, lettering, or finishing in your favourite art app. No more grey paper texture or smudged pencil fill: Sketch Clean isolates your lines so you can work digitally without redrawing from scratch. Private by design: processing stays on your device — no upload, no account, no analytics. HOW IT WORKS - Photograph your sketch or pick one from your photo library - Sketch Clean detects the page, corrects perspective, and removes paper tint and shadows - Your clean line art is ready on a transparent background in seconds FEATURES - Transparent PNG export — lines on alpha, ready to layer in Procreate, Clip Studio, Photoshop, or any digital art tool - "On White" export — share a white-background version that looks great anywhere - Automatic page detection and perspective correction — no manual cropping needed - Shadow and tint removal — handles yellowed paper, uneven lighting, and pencil smudge - Sensitivity slider — keep faint construction lines or capture only bold strokes - Preserve tones toggle — retain subtle pencil graduation or output pure black lines - Before/after comparison slider — drag to see the difference - Share directly to other apps via the iOS share sheet COMPLETELY OFFLINE Every step of processing happens on your iPhone or iPad. Your sketches are never uploaded anywhere. No internet connection required. ONE PRICE, NO SURPRISES Sketch Clean is a one-time purchase. No subscriptions, no in-app purchases, no ads. Pay once, use forever. PERFECT FOR - Tr…

name: iPray: Adhan · Prayer · Qibla
source_text: iPray: Adhan · Prayer · Qibla Utilities iPray follows a zero-configuration policy, which means that it works for everyone out of the box, without ever needing to configure anything. It's the ultimate tool to get accurate prayer timings (اوقات صلاة) no matter where you are in the world, along with accurate Qibla direction. * Enjoy NO Subscription. NO Ads. NO Privacy invasion. * Let iPray automatically detect your location or pick your own custom location if you prefer to not use GPS * Offline Prayer times wherever you are in the world. No network connection, sign-up or login required * For the frequent traveller, iPray can optionally, automatically update itself in the background without ever needing to launch the app * No settings required out of the box. iPray is completely automatic as it detects your location, appropriate prayer calculation method, timezone and much more * Sound and Vibration Alerts. Get automatic reminders for individual prayers. Supports various azan alerts as well as vibration only alerts * Pre-Prayer alerts. Get reminded of the next prayer 30 minutes in advance to help you prepare * Displays prayer times for: Fajr, *Ishraaq, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha and Qiyam-ul-lail (Last 1/3rd of the night; Tahajjud Prayer) * Landscape Prayer Timetable. Turn your device landscape to see upcoming prayer times for the week / month / year. Best way to observe Ramadan monthly prayer times * Apple Watch app, as well as support for various watch-face complications. Please note: not all complications are the same. name: 기타 튜너 - LikeTones
source_text: 기타 튜너 - LikeTones music Free. No Ads. Professional guitar tuner with high precision. A simple and very effective way to tune your guitar because of its many features. Professional Guitar Tuner We created a unique algorithm designed for the guitar to achieve the best quality of guitar tuning. Because of this, our guitar tuner allows you to tune with very high professional precision. You'll get rich and accurate tones. Guitar Tuner with Real Sounds Another feature of this guitar tuner is the ability to tune a guitar with the help of sounds. 1) Tap on the guitar note to hear a tuned sound. 2) Try to match the sound with your guitar. You can train your musical ear by matching the sound with your guitar. Fast Guitar Tuner Tune the guitar faster with the automatic mode. You can play any note, and we will properly detect it to give you hints on how to tune a guitar. Guitar Tuner with Many Settings In this guitar tuner, you'll find many settings, such as: - different guitar tuning variations - dark mode - notation language - reference frequency - left-handed mode - additional information And much more! With this guitar tuner, you'll get regular updates. We constantly monitor the quality and create improvements, so you have the best guitar tuner app. Do you have questions or improvements for our guitar tuner? Please send us a message at support@liketones.com Thanks for tuning your guitar with our app! liketones.com

name: JSON Tools
source_text: JSON Tools developer-tools The ultimate JSON toolkit for developers. Visualize, validate, convert, and generate code - all in one powerful, beautifully designed iOS app. JSON Tools is the professional-grade JSON utility built for developers who demand speed, precision, and versatility. Whether you're debugging API responses, prototyping data schemas, or generating type-safe model classes, JSON Tools handles it all natively on iPhone and iPad. Visualize & Explore Dive into your JSON with an interactive Tree View and JSONPath-powered querying. Use the Table View to inspect arrays like a spreadsheet. Rainbow column highlighting makes CSV/TSV output instantly readable. Format & Transform Prettify nested structures with smart indentation or strip whitespace with the Minify engine. Convert JSON to XML, CSV, TSV, TOML, YAML, HTML, Markdown, Base64, and more instantly. Generate Production-Ready Stub Code Export type-safe model classes for Dart, Swift, Kotlin, Java, Python, TypeScript, and C# with intelligent property singularization and pluralization. Stop writing boilerplate JSON Tools writes it for you. Validate with Confidence Auto-generate JSON Schema from any object, then validate payloads against it in real time. Catch errors before they reach production. Built for iOS A dedicated JSON syntax keyboard overlay, native Document Picker integration, and background processing keep the experience fast and fluid even on massive datasets.

five_sentences.need_moment: 필요한 순간: iPhone·iPad 개발 작업 중.
five_sentences.advantage: 기존 대안과 비교한 판정 근거: JSON 문서 입력 → 구조 시각화·검증·변환 → CSV·YAML 또는 타입 안전 코드 출력의 세로 조각이 가능하다.

decision_reason: JSON 문서 입력 → 구조 시각화·검증·변환 → CSV·YAML 또는 타입 안전 코드 출력의 세로 조각이 가능하다.

audit.reason: JSON 입력과 변환·검증 결과가 매우 구체적이다.

selection_reason: JSON 텍스트 하나를 검사해 배포를 막는 문법 오류 위치 하나를 즉시 표시하는 개발자 검증 흐름이다.
prior_review_feedback: 과거 Stress-3 3/3·Latin-9 6 pass·3 review였고 review는 제목과 결과 범위가 넓은 문제였다. CSV·YAML·코드 변환은 버리고 입력은 JSON 텍스트 블록 하나, 결과는 오류 위치가 표시된 검사 결과 하나로 고정한다. 모든 payer는 JSON을 붙여 넣고 배포·연동·공유 직전에 오류를 찾는 개발 실무자다. 세 twist는 첫 문법 오류 줄, 잘못 닫힌 괄호 위치, 잘못된 쉼표 위치 표시만 바꾼다.

name: Massive Dev Chart Timer
source_text: Massive Dev Chart Timer Photo et vidéo The Massive Dev Chart is the world's largest film development chart with easy to use multi step timer and darkroom support for iPhone and iPad. Watch the instructional video at: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=P915z6THiY8. *** Features *** • Offline copy of The Massive Dev Chart in your pocket • Multi Step Timer with sound notifications • Customizable agitation scheme • Darkroom themes • Dilution Mixer • Support for two-step development and two-step fixing • Support for optional hypoclear and photo flo steps • Automated development time/temperature compensation

five_sentences.input: 구체적인 입력: development steps and temperature.
five_sentences.process: 핵심 처리: multi-step timer and time/temperature compensation.
five_sentences.need_moment: 필요한 순간: one film development session.
five_sentences.advantage: 기존 대안과 비교한 판정 근거: 현상 단계와 온도를 받아 보정된 시간을 계산하고, 한 번의 필름 현상용 다단계 타이머를 제공한다.

decision_reason: 현상 단계와 온도를 받아 보정된 시간을 계산하고, 한 번의 필름 현상용 다단계 타이머를 제공한다.

audit.reason: 현상 단계와 온도에서 보정 타이머가 구체적으로 산출된다.

selection_reason: 필름·현상액·희석·온도 텍스트 한 덩어리로 보정된 현상 시간표 하나를 계산하는 아날로그 사진 전문 도구다.
prior_review_feedback: 과거 Stress-3 3/3·Latin-9 6 pass·3 review였고 원본에 없는 한국 동호회 레시피가 review 원인이었다. 외부 커뮤니티 데이터는 제거한다. 입력은 '필름 | 현상액 | 희석 | 온도' 텍스트 블록 하나로 고정한다. 모든 payer는 흑백 필름을 직접 현상하는 사진가·현상실 실무자, 모든 moment는 약품을 붓기 직전으로 통일한다. 세 twist는 온도 보정 시간표, 교반 시점 포함 시간표, 푸시 1스톱 시간표로 제한한다.
